data.content: Implementation review APPROVED. Diff is minimal and correct: 2 symmetric changes in write_dispatch.rs add lease provider->username fallback for both note and handoff metadata, matching the existing pattern for agentname/model/version. All 5 acceptance criteria verified: (1) note auto-fills from lease, (2) handoff auto-fills from lease, (3) no 'unknown' when lease has values, (4) show returns persisted metadata, (5) no resend required. Tests cover auto-fill, override, and no-lease fallback for both note and handoff. Sanity passes: 711 tests, 95.17% coverage, no lint/format issues.
